primary.name: Timothy J. Cartwright

primary.name: Greg Blaney Reidy
primary.title: Founder / Managing Director (CCO on ADV; publicly CIO/CEO)

primary.name: Brandon C. Johnson, CFA
primary.title: Principal, CEO (publicly also CIO)
primary.selection_basis: CEO and controlling owner (indirect 50-75% via B&W Holdings LLC), publicly CEO & CIO guiding investment decisions.

secondary.name: Eric S. Adams, CFA, CAIA
secondary.title: Partner, Co-Chief Investment Officer
